response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong full-stack and backend engineer with deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise and solid high-performance systems experience, but the role demands senior-level C++ proficiency as its core requirement. His C++ exposure is limited to approximately six months at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project — far below the depth required for architecting STL-heavy, multi-threaded, concurrent industrial systems. Additionally, he has no background in industrial automation, IEC 62443 secure development lifecycle, MQTT, message brokers in an industrial context, or any of the specialized industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) that are central to this domain.
strengths: Demonstrated experience building high-performance, low-latency microservices at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second using asynchronous I/O and caching
Covers several advantageous skills listed in the JD: Node.js, React, and event-driven architecture (GISCollective platform)
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record via recurring workshops, code dojos, and conference talks
concerns: C++ proficiency is superficial — limited to ~6 months at National Instruments and a university thesis; no STL, multi-threading, or concurrent C++ systems work at scale
Zero exposure to industrial automation, IEC 62443, secure development lifecycle, or any industrial cybersecurity standards
No experience with MQTT, message brokers in industrial contexts, or industrial protocols such as Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, IEC 61850, or DNP 3.0
